name: promptfoo
description: Agent skills for connecting, evaluating, and red teaming LLM applications with Promptfoo.

interface.shortDescription: Create evals, connect targets, and red team LLM apps
interface.longDescription: Promptfoo skills for configuring providers and targets, writing eval suites, and setting up or running red team workflows against LLM apps.
defaultPrompt: Write a Promptfoo eval for this behavior.
Use Promptfoo to connect my HTTP endpoint to an eval.
Set up or run Promptfoo red teaming for this API.
